title: Mob Paintings
description: Adds 26 new Mob Paintings to the Game
body:
## This Mod adds 26 new Mob Paintings to the Game

![All Paintings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4df672e77f40818920009d75f8ce4dccb635670.jpeg)

You can get the 26 Paintings in the same way like the normal vanilla ones
This mod does not replace any existing paintings
You are free to include this mod in your modpacks
